mapper.sql: code, day, name, open, high, low, trade, last_trade, percent, volume, amount, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, ma60, ma120, dea, dif, macd, cross_params
mapper.select: select * from min30k where code = #{code} and day = #{min30}
mapper.delete: delete from min30k where code = #{code} and day = #{min30}
mapper.select:
select max(day) from min30k where code = 'sh600000'
and day < #{fromMin30}

select
from min30k s
and s.code in
#{item}
